request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired FEMA coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded civil defense programs leave communities vulnerable. The 2023 Midwest floods showed what happens when we cut preparedness budgets - response times doubled and recovery costs tripled. We can't afford to gamble with our safety. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
